task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the Bonneville Salt Flats.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main map view shows a white, flat terrain characteristic of salt flats. The coordinates in the status bar or search bar are near 40.77°N, 113.86°W.

task_completion.description: Placemark 'Cal Point A' is created and visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A placemark labeled 'Cal Point A' is visible on the map or listed in the 'My Places' sidebar.

task_completion.description: Placemark 'Cal Point B' is created and visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A placemark labeled 'Cal Point B' is visible on the map or listed in the 'My Places' sidebar.

task_completion.description: Cal Point B is positioned due East of Cal Point A.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the map view (assuming North is up), 'Cal Point B' is located to the right of 'Cal Point A'. Both points are on the salt flat surface.

task_completion.description: The distance between the placemarks is verified to be approximately 1 kilometer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Ruler' tool window is open showing a measurement of approximately 1.00 km between the points, OR the map scale legend confirms the distance is consistent with 1km, OR the properties dialog shows coordinates reflecting a ~1km offset.

integrity.description: Agent used the Google Earth GUI tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the toolbar (Placemark icon, Ruler icon) or sidebar menus.

integrity.description: Agent did not generate KML externally.
integrity.visual_evidence: No evidence of using a text editor or scripting terminal to generate KML code for import.

integrity.description: Placemarks were created manually or via coordinate entry.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'New Placemark' or 'Properties' dialog box is visible during the task.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Bonneville Salt Flats are located at 40.77°N, -113.86°W and appear as a distinct white surface. To be 1km due East at this latitude, 'Cal Point B' should be to the right of 'Cal Point A' on the map. The longitude difference for 1km East at 40.77°N is approximately 0.012 degrees (e.g., from -113.860 to -113.848).
